title: TSGG Reference Implementation
description: Reference implementation and validation harness for Trusted Safety State Governance Graphs (TSGG): an open-source software trace architecture for auditable human-AI systems. The release includes the Python package (dualexis), reproducible validation commands, synthetic benchmark scenarios, leakage-audit scripts, and artefact documentation accompanying the Journal of Systems and Software manuscript.
notes: Archive for Journal of Systems and Software (JSS) software artefact submission. Cite the Zenodo DOI together with the JSS paper when available.
